author: xferbuson
orig: Banana clicer to wchodzisz co 3 godz i liczysz na cos innego niz zwykly banna
en: Banana clicer - you come in every 3 hours and expect something other than regular banana
pt: Clicer de banana - você chega a cada 3 horas e espera algo diferente da banana normal
label: suspicious

context.author: radziol
context.orig: To wrócę sobie xd bo 3.1 latam
context.en: So I'll come back xd because I've been flying for 3.1 years
context.pt: Então voltarei xd porque voo há 3,1 anos

context.author: xferbuson
context.orig: bongo to dropi tylko cos co nie sprzedaje sie, gram od 2 dni, ale patrzalem na rynek i ktos kupil za 4k itemek jakis XD
context.en: bongo only drops something that doesn't sell, I've been playing for 2 days, but I was looking at the market and someone bought some item for 4k XD
context.pt: bongo só dropa algo que não vende, estou jogando há 2 dias, mas estava olhando no mercado e alguém comprou algum item por 4k XD
context.label: clean

context.author: radziol
context.orig: taki drop, imo w nightmare lepszy mialem
context.en: such a drop, imo I had a better one in Nightmare
context.pt: que queda, eu tive uma melhor em Nightmare
context.label: clean

context.author: xbiedro
context.orig: Ja dziś robiłem opening w sumie +-20 torment i +-30 hell 2 arkany hełmy dało i monetke imortal
context.en: Today I did the opening with a total of +-20 torment and +-30 hell 2 arcana helmets and gave me an imortal coin
context.pt: Hoje fiz a abertura com um total de +-20 tormento e +-30 capacetes arcanos hell 2 e me dei uma moeda imortal
context.label: clean

context.author: radziol
context.orig: Biedro, a bossa etapu to bijesz 3 czy 1?
context.en: Biedro, do you beat the stage boss 3 times or 1 time?
